painpoints.label: Compute/auth unblock
painpoints.delivery_target: same-day diagnosis pack plus a bounded fallback-lane plan
painpoints.memory_upgrade: store the solved blocker as a reusable credential/quota checklist and fallback policy
painpoints.solution_pattern: credential and quota diagnosis, provider fallback selection, bounded retry policy

painpoints.label: Human unlock contract
painpoints.delivery_target: rapid handoff contract and operator-ready approval payload
painpoints.memory_upgrade: turn the resolved human gate into a reusable handoff template and operator checklist
painpoints.solution_pattern: minimal do-now/send-back/done-when contract plus operator evidence pack

painpoints.label: Wallet/payment repair
painpoints.first_offer: verification path + retry-safe payment state machine
painpoints.delivery_target: payment-path diagnosis plus retry-safe verification flow
painpoints.memory_upgrade: persist verified payment-state transitions and recovery rules for future jobs
painpoints.solution_pattern: payment-state diagnosis, verification boundary, retry-safe recovery path

painpoints.label: Self-improvement packaging
painpoints.first_offer: turn solved blocker into reusable memory/checklist/guardrail
painpoints.delivery_target: convert one solved blocker into reusable memory, guardrails, and a repeatable checklist
painpoints.memory_upgrade: write the solution back into durable agent memory with a guardrail and reuse checklist
painpoints.solution_pattern: extract blocker -> rule -> checklist -> reusable memory object

painpoints.label: MCP/API contract
painpoints.delivery_target: contract draft plus one bounded integration path with validation notes
painpoints.memory_upgrade: store the final tool/resource contract as a reusable integration template
painpoints.solution_pattern: schema diagnosis, contract draft, bounded integration path
